meta.title: Pricing · EcyPro
meta.description: Transparent, scalable plans. Pick what fits today, upgrade as you grow.

hero.title: Choose the plan that fits your business
hero.subtitle: Monthly or yearly. All plans include a 14-day free strategy session.

comparison.title: Detailed comparison
comparison.subtitle: Full capability matrix across all plans.

items.q: Can I change my plan later?
items.a: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time; charges are prorated.

items.q: Do you offer refunds on yearly billing?
items.a: We offer a no-questions-asked refund within the first 30 days.
Listed prices are exclusive of tax. VAT is shown separately on invoices.

cta.title: Not sure which plan is right for you?
cta.subtitle: Let's schedule a 20-minute free discovery call.
